title: UPI Intent Payment Instrument
description: Payment instrument for UPI Intent deep link payments. Extends the base payment instrument with UPI-specific display properties. The device operating system determines which UPI apps are available to the buyer. The credential (intent_uri) is generated by the business via PSP and returned in the escalation response — the platform executes the deep link natively.

display.description: Display information for this UPI Intent instrument.

name.description: Human-readable name for platform UI (e.g., 'Pay via UPI').

logo.description: HTTPS URL to UPI logo for platform UI.
